CVE-2017-20148.title: In the ebuild package through logcheck-1.3.23.ebuild for Logcheck ...
CVE-2017-20148.description: In the ebuild package through logcheck-1.3.23.ebuild for Logcheck on Gentoo, it is possible to achieve root privilege escalation from the logcheck user because of insecure recursive chown calls.
